siteDescription: Digital Exhibition of technical pioneers and creative innovations.

hero.title: Zen Exhibition Platform
hero.subtitle: Discover the next generation of technical pioneers in our 2026 showcase for Motherland Secondary School.

contentSections.title: Zen Innovation
contentSections.description: We explore the cutting edge of web technologies, from advanced animations to secure database integrations. Our exhibition showcases how modern tools can be pushed to their limits.

contentSections.title: Telemetary Database
contentSections.description: Zen is a web application that uses AI to analyze telemetry data from users and generate reports. It is a tool that can be used to improve the experience of users.
